Dokumenten-Analyse & Informations-Extrak.name: toktoken
Dokumenten-Analyse & Informations-Extrak.description: TokToken is a fast, single-binary C codebase indexer for AI coding agents. Powered by universal-ctags and SQLite FTS5, it provides precise symbol search, dependency tracking, and an MCP server. TokToken reduces LLM context token usage by 88-99% by retrieving exact code symbols instead of reading entire files. Zero runtime dependencies.
Dokumenten-Analyse & Informations-Extrak.categorization_reason: Codebase-Indexer zur drastischen Reduzierung von Kontext-Tokens bei Agenten.

The resulting HTML-reports provide a transparent overview of your devices' security configuration compared to international security standards and hardening guides.
Windows-Härtung & Active-Directory-Siche.categorization_reason: Automatisierte Erstellung von Compliance-Berichten nach Sicherheitsstandards.

Windows-Härtung & Active-Directory-Siche.name: Harden-Windows-Security
Windows-Härtung & Active-Directory-Siche.description: Harden Windows Safely, Securely using Official Supported Microsoft methods and proper explanation | Always up-to-date and works with the latest build of Windows | Provides tools and Guides for Personal, Enterprise, Government and Military security levels | SLSA Level 3 Compliant for Secure Development and Build Process | Apps Available on MS Store✨
Windows-Härtung & Active-Directory-Siche.categorization_reason: Umfangreiches Regelwerk und Skripte zur Härtung von Windows-Systemen.

Windows-Härtung & Active-Directory-Siche.name: secureboot_objects

Windows-Härtung & Active-Directory-Siche.categorization_reason: Empfohlene Secure Boot Objekte zur Absicherung des Windows-Startvorgangs.

Windows-Härtung & Active-Directory-Siche.name: secrets_find0r
Windows-Härtung & Active-Directory-Siche.description: Secrets Find0r is a multithreaded SMB share crawler that hunts for exposed credentials and secrets across Windows networks. It enumerates shares, recursively scans files with regex/keyword rules, highlights matched tokens on screen, and exports clean ASCII tables. Supports DOCX/PDF/legacy Office and depth limits.
Windows-Härtung & Active-Directory-Siche.categorization_reason: Sicherheits-Tool zum Aufspüren von Passwörtern in Windows-Netzwerkfreigaben.

Windows-Härtung & Active-Directory-Siche.description: A collection of Azure AD/Entra tools for offensive and defensive security purposes
Windows-Härtung & Active-Directory-Siche.categorization_reason: Sicherheits- und Analysewerkzeuge für Azure Active Directory / Entra ID.

Windows-Härtung & Active-Directory-Siche.name: Entra-Tiering-Security-Model
Windows-Härtung & Active-Directory-Siche.description: Implement a powerful Tiering Security Model in Microsoft Entra for your Cloud Administrator identities using Azure Automation.
Windows-Härtung & Active-Directory-Siche.categorization_reason: Implementierung eines administrativen Stufen-Sicherheitsmodells in Entra ID.

Windows-Härtung & Active-Directory-Siche.name: HardeningAudit

Windows-Härtung & Active-Directory-Siche.categorization_reason: Skripte zur Überprüfung und Durchsetzung von CIS-Sicherheitsbenchmarks.

Windows-Härtung & Active-Directory-Siche.name: WHfBChecks

Windows-Härtung & Active-Directory-Siche.name: BTPS-SecPack
Windows-Härtung & Active-Directory-Siche.description: This repository contains a collection of PowerShell tools that can be utilized to protect and defend an environment based on the recommendations of multiple cyber security researchers at Microsoft. These tools were created with a small to medium size enterprise environment in mind as smaller organizations do not always have the type of funding available to overly spend on security. The goal of this project is to help add value to an smaller organizations security by creating more visibility for the average IT Administrator. Organizations with 1,000’s of devices may find that this entire suite does not apply to them.
Windows-Härtung & Active-Directory-Siche.categorization_reason: PowerShell-Sicherheitswerkzeuge zur Erkennung und Abwehr von Bedrohungen.

Intune & Enterprise Endpoint Management.description: Keyboard-driven terminal workspace for Intune administration. Query the Microsoft Graph API visually, browse 100+ built-in queries across 102 Intune resources, export as CSV/JSON/PowerShell/cURL, run remediation actions, and generate queries from natural language using local AI. Install from PowerShell Gallery with Install-Module IntuneQL.
